TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Chad, title = Chad, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chad} }

S.FORM: == Takaray sowal == Cate . Itiraay I sasifo'an no Afrika a karopaw kitakit, isaka'amis moda'edo ato Lipiya, katimol mada'edo ato Sifo'ay-Afrika Kapolongan Kitakit, isaka'etip malafiyaw ato Kemayrong, Nayciriya, isaka'etip malala'ed ato Niru kitakit. O ngangan nona kitakit nani mikinganganay to Cate-Fanaw, o satakaraway a lotok i,o itiraay i Sahara-Tafotafokan a Kusi lotok, o Enciyangna ko syoto, o sakakaay kona tokay. Itini i Cate cisafaw ko 200 finacadan , o Fransu ato Arabiya kono sifo'an a sowal, o Islam a Pitooran ko sa'alomanay ko salikaka. I'ayaw niyiesoan to 7000 miheca iraay to ko masaniyaro'ay a tamdaw maro' itini, tahira to saka9 sici, adihay ko masaromromaay a kitakit mapatireng matekop itini ton apala, mikowanay to paliwalay to saka'orip dafong to 'edef no Sahara-Tafotafokan. I 1920 miheca maaro' no Fransu malacecay a pecih no mikotoday a kitakit no Fransu Sifo'ay-Konis no cikiw a Afrika. 1960 miheca keriden ni Folangsowa-Tomupapayie misiiked nani pikowan no Fransu, na malacongtong ci Folangsowa-Tomupapayie i,mifelih ko Muslin a tamdaw to tayal ningra, orasaka, i 1965 miheca malengat ko Laloma'an-Lalood no Cate. 1979 miheca Mifelihay to sifo a sofitay ma'eco nangra ko syoto, mapalasawad ko ikatimolay a sifo a pikowan. Nikawrira, macacolicoli ko kakeridean no Mifelihay-Sofitay, saikoray to i,ci Hasan-Haporoy ko pakalowiday tona lalood a malacongtong, caka halafin mafelih noTtapang-Sofitay ci Yitolis-Topi-Yiteno . Nani 2003 mihecaan malingato ko fodfod no Sa'etipay Sotan, sano yanan sato ca ka ca kaira ko rarawraw no Cate. Ora ko saka mala sanikaway ato kalipaysoay ko malatapangay a kitakit itini i hekal. I 2003 miheca maceror tono simal kasoling ko takomod o sapili'etan no Cate kitakit. i 15 00 N, 19 00 E, noAfilika ko Chad. Polong no sekalay i 1.284 million sq km "saka 21 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 1,259,200 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 24,800 sq km " Polong i 11,852,462 ko tamdaw. O tatapangan no sowal O minganganay to Cate-Fanaw, ona sowal tonini i,o Sade sanay a sowal no Kanuli , o imi i,o fanaw, kakahaday a nanonanoman sanay. Ona sowal to nini i,o kalosowal no Nayciliya, Niru,Cate ato Komaylon, ira ko 400 ofald ko tamdaw sowalay tonini sowal, o itiraay i Lipiya a mamangay finacadan ato malaklakay a maro' i Sotan a tamdaw a sowal konini. Likisi I'ayaw niyiesoan to 7000 miheca iraay to ko masaniyaro'ay a tamdaw maro' itini,o ci'afoay a pala itini, orasaka, mahenay a matenak ko tamdaw. O tadamaanay a Nikarkaran-Pala o Etal, o I'ayaway ni Yieso to 2000 miheca. O masadangahay a pala no Cate a maomahay tamdaw mata'elifay ko 'ayaw ni Yieso to 2000 miheca. O kalengatan no masasiromaromaay a rayray no 'orip itini. I saka 9 sici tahira i saka 10 sici patireng ko Saaw tamdaw to sarakatay a hotian kitakit o Kanaymu-Pornu Hontian Kitakit(加奈姆-博爾努帝國;Kanem–Bornu Empire), Tahira sato i saka 16 sici mapatireng ko Pacimir-Hontian Kirakit ato Watayi-Hontian Kitakit , ona tolo a kitakit cila malalood cila malalood. Tahira to i 1883 miheca tahira 1893 miheca matekop no Lapihe-Cupayr kona toloay Hontian kitakit. O nidamaan no Frasu a congtong ci Haysan-Hapoloy , felihen no tapang no sofitay ci Yitolis-Topi. Na malacongtong to ci Topi, sapitokitokaw malacongton i 2005 miheca midemak to Fainawlan-Pitopa to sapiflicaw to kimpo ta malarid mamalacongtong kako yo sanay a pisafaloco' ningra, malalang no Mifelihay-Kasafelaw, mafodfod to ko kitakit, 2006 miheca, cowa ka pihayi ko Mifelihay-Kasafelaw to sinkiw maala heca ci Topi. Tongal sato ko kafodfod no kitakit i laloma', milekal ko Linhoko ano pakomira han i, a matiya to Tafo(達佛戰爭 ; Arapiya a sowal : الحرب في دارفور‎)sapipalahedawaw sa to finacadan a misawsaw(種族滅絕 ; Ikiris a sowal :genocide) Tamdaw O sa'osi i 2005 mihea ira ko 10,146,000 ko polong a tamdaw no Cate, o itokayay mahaop ko 25%, o iniyaro'ay ira ko 74%. Ilaloma' no nini i, mahaop ko 47.3% a tamdaw caho i 15 mihecaan, o nisofocan 1000 ko tamdaw mahop ko 42.35%, o mapatayay mahop ko 16.69%, o lalen no 'orip 47.2 ko mihecaan. O faco raramod no Cate a tamdaw i, cecay ko fainayan 'aloman ko fafahi, ira ko 39% a fafahiyan o matiniay ko 'orip, mihayiay ko riked no Cate to matiniay a kararamod. Talacowa milalangay ko rikec aka pipalo to fafahiyan sanay, nikawrira, mararid ira ko mapaloay a fafahiyan. Ano mirocok to dafong i, talacowa awaay ko pisakakinih no rikec i, nikawrira, o kakeridan no niyaro' misawkit sa i, pasitiniay i fainayan. I Cate cisafaw ko 200 ko kasasiromaroma no finacadan, o faco no niyaro' ira ko masamaanay, itiya ho yo mikowan ho Fransu tona kitakit, sapipatirengaw to sakalacecay no kitakit, nikawrira, o kakereidan no kasaetal ato wayway no pitooran ko ikakaay haratengen no Cate a tamdaw.o niyah a finacadan o niyah a kamaro'an. O sakakaay a finacadan i katimol o Sala tamdaw, o sakatosa o maro'ay i Saher etal a Arapiya tamdaw, i ka'amis o pakaenay to 'a'adopen a Tupu tamdaw. O sowal i, no sifo a sowal ono Faransu ato Arapiya a sowal, orama sa i, ira ho ko cisafaw to 100 ko sowal. Tata'ang ko pirecep no punka no Arapiya itini, orasaka, o kalosowal ko sowal no Arapiya. Pitooran Osao'si i 2014-15 miheca, ilaloma' no polong a tamdaw ira ko 52.1% o Muslin, 44.1% o Misakristoay ( Fa'elohay Kristo 23.9%, Tinsukiw 20%, 0.2% oroma a misakristoay), To'asan a pitooran(泛靈論; Ikiris a sowal :Animism) 0.3%, o cowa ka pitoor 2.8%, o caay ka pa'ifana' to pitooran 0.7%. O to'asan a pitooran hananay i, o paso'elinay to maamaan,o Islam Pitooran ato Misafristaay mapalamlam tono to'asan ho pitooran ato lisin. O Muslin masaopoay i ka'amis ato kawali no Cate, o To'asan Pitooran ato Kristo itiraay i katimol ato KaylaEtal. Ano do'edoen ko Tatapangan Rikec no kitakit, cowa pasicecay sanay i liongkay misikoray to ihekalay a 'orip, mipa'adingay to paifaloco'an a pitoor, o masasiromaromaay a pitooran i Cate manga'ay ko kalawidang.
S.PHON: == takaraj so~uwaɾ == ʦatə . itiraaj i sasifo~uʡan no~u afrika a karo~upaw kitakit, isakaʡamis mo~uɬ~ɮaʡəɬ~ɮo~u ato~u ɾipija, katimo~uɾ maɬ~ɮaʡəɬ~ɮo~u ato~u sifo~uʡaj-afrika kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit, isakaʡətip maɾafijaw ato~u kəmajro~uŋ, najʦirija, isakaʡətip maɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ ato~u niro~u~u kitakit. o~u ŋaŋan no~una kitakit nani mikiŋaŋanaj to~u ʦatə-fanaw, o~u satakarawaj a ɾo~uto~uk i,o~u itiraaj i saħara-tafo~utafo~ukan a ko~u~usi ɾo~uto~uk, o~u ənʦijaŋna ko~u sjo~uto~u, o~u sakakaaj ko~una to~ukaj. itini i ʦatə ʦisafaw ko~u *** finaʦaɬ~ɮan , o~u franso~u~u ato~u arab~b~vija ko~uno~u sifo~uʡan a so~uwaɾ, o~u isɾam a pito~uo~uran ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u saɾikaka. iʡajaw nijiəso~uan to~u **** miħəʦa iraaj to~u ko~u masanijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡ itini, taħira to~u saka* siʦi, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u masaro~umro~umaaj a kitakit mapatirəŋ matəko~up itini to~un apaɾa, miko~uwanaj to~u paɾiwaɾaj to~u sakaʡo~urip ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ to~u ʡəɬ~ɮəf no~u saħara-tafo~utafo~ukan. i **** miħəʦa maaro~uʡ no~u franso~u~u maɾaʦəʦaj a pəʦiħ no~u miko~uto~uɬ~ɮaj a kitakit no~u franso~u~u sifo~uʡaj-ko~unis no~u ʦikiw a afrika. **** miħəʦa kəriɬ~ɮən ni fo~uɾaŋso~uwa-to~umo~u~upapajiə misiikəɬ~ɮ nani piko~uwan no~u franso~u~u, na maɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi fo~uɾaŋso~uwa-to~umo~u~upapajiə i,mifəɾiħ ko~u mo~u~usɾin a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u tajaɾ niŋra, o~urasaka, i **** miħəʦa maɾəŋat ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan-ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ʦatə. **** miħəʦa mifəɾiħaj to~u sifo~u a so~ufitaj maʡəʦo~u naŋra ko~u sjo~uto~u, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u ikatimo~uɾaj a sifo~u a piko~uwan. nikawrira, maʦaʦo~uɾiʦo~uɾi ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮəan no~u mifəɾiħaj-so~ufitaj, saiko~uraj to~u i,ʦi ħasan-ħapo~uro~uj ko~u pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮaj to~una ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a maɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ, ʦaka ħaɾafin mafəɾiħ no~uttapaŋ-so~ufitaj ʦi jito~uɾis-to~upi-jitəno~u . nani **** miħəʦaan maɾiŋato~u ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ no~u saʡətipaj so~utan, sano~u janan sato~u ʦa ka ʦa kaira ko~u rarawraw no~u ʦatə. o~ura ko~u saka maɾa sanikawaj ato~u kaɾipajso~uaj ko~u maɾatapaŋaj a kitakit itini i ħəkaɾ. i **** miħəʦa maʦəro~ur to~uno~u simaɾ kaso~uɾiŋ ko~u tako~umo~uɬ~ɮ o~u sapiɾiʡətan no~u ʦatə kitakit. i ** ** n, ** ** ə, no~uafiɾika ko~u ʦħaɬ~ɮ. po~uɾo~uŋ no~u səkaɾaj i *.*** miɾɾio~un s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŋaŋan. " "o~u səkaɾaj no~u səra i, *,***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a səkaɾaj i, **,*** s* km " po~uɾo~uŋ i **,***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u tatapaŋan no~u so~uwaɾ o~u miŋaŋanaj to~u ʦatə-fanaw, o~una so~uwaɾ to~unini i,o~u saɬ~ɮə sanaj a so~uwaɾ no~u kano~u~uɾi , o~u imi i,o~u fanaw, kakaħaɬ~ɮaj a nano~unano~uman sanaj. o~una so~uwaɾ to~u nini i,o~u kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ no~u najʦiɾija, niro~u~u,ʦatə ato~u ko~umajɾo~un, ira ko~u *** o~ufaɾɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw so~uwaɾaj to~unini so~uwaɾ, o~u itiraaj i ɾipija a mamaŋaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u maɾakɾakaj a maro~uʡ i so~utan a tamɬ~ɮaw a so~uwaɾ ko~unini. ɾikisi iʡajaw nijiəso~uan to~u **** miħəʦa iraaj to~u ko~u masanijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡ itini,o~u ʦiʡafo~uaj a paɾa itini, o~urasaka, maħənaj a matənak ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a nikarkaran-paɾa o~u ətaɾ, o~u iʡajawaj ni jiəso~u to~u **** miħəʦa. o~u masaɬ~ɮaŋaħaj a paɾa no~u ʦatə a mao~umaħaj tamɬ~ɮaw mataʡəɾifaj ko~u ʡajaw ni jiəso~u to~u **** miħəʦa. o~u kaɾəŋatan no~u masasiro~umaro~umaaj a rajraj no~u ʡo~urip itini. i saka * siʦi taħira i saka ** siʦi patirəŋ ko~u saaw tamɬ~ɮaw to~u sarakataj a ħo~utian kitakit o~u kanajmo~u~u-po~urno~u~u ħo~untian kitakit(***-*****;kanəm*b~b~vo~urno~u~u əmpirə), taħira sato~u i saka ** siʦi mapatirəŋ ko~u paʦimir-ħo~untian kirakit ato~u wataji-ħo~untian kitakit , o~una to~uɾo~u a kitakit ʦiɾa maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ʦiɾa maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. taħira to~u i **** miħəʦa taħira **** miħəʦa matəko~up no~u ɾapiħə-ʦo~u~upajr ko~una to~uɾo~uaj ħo~untian kitakit. o~u niɬ~ɮamaan no~u fraso~u~u a ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ħajsan-ħapo~uɾo~uj , fəɾiħən no~u tapaŋ no~u so~ufitaj ʦi jito~uɾis-to~upi. na maɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ to~u ʦi to~upi, sapito~ukito~ukaw maɾaʦo~uŋto~un i **** miħəʦa miɬ~ɮəmak to~u fainawɾan-pito~upa to~u sapifɾiʦaw to~u kimpo~u ta maɾariɬ~ɮ mamaɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ kako~u jo~u sanaj a pisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra, maɾaɾaŋ no~u mifəɾiħaj-kasafəɾaw, mafo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u kitakit, **** miħəʦa, ʦo~uwa ka piħaji ko~u mifəɾiħaj-kasafəɾaw to~u sinkiw maaɾa ħəʦa ʦi to~upi. to~uŋaɾ sato~u ko~u kafo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ no~u kitakit i ɾaɾo~umaʡ, miɾəkaɾ ko~u ɾinħo~uko~u ano~u pako~umira ħan i, a matija to~u tafo~u(**** ; arapija a so~uwaɾ : ***** ** *******)sapipaɾaħəɬ~ɮawaw sa to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a misawsaw(**** ; ikiris a so~uwaɾ :*əno~uʦiɬ~ɮə) tamɬ~ɮaw o~u saʡo~usi i **** miħəa ira ko~u **,***,*** ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ʦatə, o~u ito~ukajaj maħao~up ko~u **%, o~u inijaro~uʡaj ira ko~u **%. iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u nini i, maħao~up ko~u **.*% a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaħo~u i ** miħəʦaan, o~u niso~ufo~uʦan **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw maħo~up ko~u **.**%, o~u mapatajaj maħo~up ko~u **.**%, o~u ɾaɾən no~u ʡo~urip **.* ko~u miħəʦaan. o~u faʦo~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ʦatə a tamɬ~ɮaw i, ʦəʦaj ko~u fainajan ʡaɾo~uman ko~u fafaħi, ira ko~u **% a fafaħijan o~u matiniaj ko~u ʡo~urip, miħajiaj ko~u rikəɬ~ɮ no~u ʦatə to~u matiniaj a kararamo~uɬ~ɮ. taɾaʦo~uwa miɾaɾaŋaj ko~u rikəʦ aka pipaɾo~u to~u fafaħijan sanaj, nikawrira, marariɬ~ɮ ira ko~u mapaɾo~uaj a fafaħijan. ano~u miro~uʦo~uk to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ i, taɾaʦo~uwa awaaj ko~u pisakakiniħ no~u rikəʦ i, nikawrira, o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ misawkit sa i, pasitiniaj i fainajan. i ʦatə ʦisafaw ko~u *** ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u faʦo~u no~u nijaro~uʡ ira ko~u masamaanaj, itija ħo~u jo~u miko~uwan ħo~u franso~u~u to~una kitakit, sapipatirəŋaw to~u sakaɾaʦəʦaj no~u kitakit, nikawrira, o~u kakərəiɬ~ɮan no~u kasaətaɾ ato~u wajwaj no~u pito~uo~uran ko~u ikakaaj ħaratəŋən no~u ʦatə a tamɬ~ɮaw.o~u nijaħ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u nijaħ a kamaro~uʡan. o~u sakakaaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i katimo~uɾ o~u saɾa tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u sakato~usa o~u maro~uʡaj i saħər ətaɾ a arapija tamɬ~ɮaw, i kaʡamis o~u pakaənaj to~u ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən a to~u~upo~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u so~uwaɾ i, no~u sifo~u a so~uwaɾ o~uno~u faranso~u~u ato~u arapija a so~uwaɾ, o~urama sa i, ira ħo~u ko~u ʦisafaw to~u *** ko~u so~uwaɾ. tataʡaŋ ko~u pirəʦəp no~u po~u~unka no~u arapija itini, o~urasaka, o~u kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u arapija. pito~uo~uran o~usao~uʡsi i ****-** miħəʦa, iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ira ko~u **.*% o~u mo~u~usɾin, **.*% o~u misakristo~uaj ( faʡəɾo~uħaj kristo~u **.*%, tinso~u~ukiw **%, *.*% o~uro~uma a misakristo~uaj), to~uʡasan a pito~uo~uran(***; ikiris a so~uwaɾ :animism) *.*%, o~u ʦo~uwa ka pito~uo~ur *.*%, o~u ʦaaj ka paʡifanaʡ to~u pito~uo~uran *.*%. o~u to~uʡasan a pito~uo~uran ħananaj i, o~u paso~uʡəɾinaj to~u maamaan,o~u isɾam pito~uo~uran ato~u misafristaaj mapaɾamɾam to~uno~u to~uʡasan ħo~u pito~uo~uran ato~u ɾisin. o~u mo~u~usɾin masao~upo~uaj i kaʡamis ato~u kawaɾi no~u ʦatə, o~u to~uʡasan pito~uo~uran ato~u kristo~u itiraaj i katimo~uɾ ato~u kajɾaətaɾ. ano~u ɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uən ko~u tatapaŋan rikəʦ no~u kitakit, ʦo~uwa pasiʦəʦaj sanaj i ɾio~uŋkaj misiko~uraj to~u iħəkaɾaj a ʡo~urip, mipaʡaɬ~ɮiŋaj to~u paifaɾo~uʦo~uʡan a pito~uo~ur, o~u masasiro~umaro~umaaj a pito~uo~uran i ʦatə maŋaʡaj ko~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.FORM: == Takaray sowal == Cate . Itiraay I sasifo'an no Afrika a karopaw kitakit, isaka'amis moda'edo ato Lipiya, katimol mada'edo ato Sifo'ay-Afrika Kapolongan Kitakit, isaka'etip malafiyaw ato Kemayrong, Nayciriya, isaka'etip malala'ed ato Niru kitakit. O ngangan nona kitakit nani mikinganganay to Cate-Fanaw, o satakaraway a lotok i,o itiraay i Sahara-Tafotafokan a Kusi lotok, o Enciyangna ko syoto, o sakakaay kona tokay. Itini i Cate cisafaw ko 200 finacadan , o Fransu ato Arabiya kono sifo'an a sowal, o Islam a Pitooran ko sa'alomanay ko salikaka. I'ayaw niyiesoan to 7000 miheca iraay to ko masaniyaro'ay a tamdaw maro' itini, tahira to saka9 sici, adihay ko masaromromaay a kitakit mapatireng matekop itini ton apala, mikowanay to paliwalay to saka'orip dafong to 'edef no Sahara-Tafotafokan. I 1920 miheca maaro' no Fransu malacecay a pecih no mikotoday a kitakit no Fransu Sifo'ay-Konis no cikiw a Afrika. 1960 miheca keriden ni Folangsowa-Tomupapayie misiiked nani pikowan no Fransu, na malacongtong ci Folangsowa-Tomupapayie i,mifelih ko Muslin a tamdaw to tayal ningra, orasaka, i 1965 miheca malengat ko Laloma'an-Lalood no Cate. 1979 miheca Mifelihay to sifo a sofitay ma'eco nangra ko syoto, mapalasawad ko ikatimolay a sifo a pikowan. Nikawrira, macacolicoli ko kakeridean no Mifelihay-Sofitay, saikoray to i,ci Hasan-Haporoy ko pakalowiday tona lalood a malacongtong, caka halafin mafelih noTtapang-Sofitay ci Yitolis-Topi-Yiteno . Nani 2003 mihecaan malingato ko fodfod no Sa'etipay Sotan, sano yanan sato ca ka ca kaira ko rarawraw no Cate. Ora ko saka mala sanikaway ato kalipaysoay ko malatapangay a kitakit itini i hekal. I 2003 miheca maceror tono simal kasoling ko takomod o sapili'etan no Cate kitakit. i 15 00 N, 19 00 E, noAfilika ko Chad. Polong no sekalay i 1.284 million sq km "saka 21 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 1,259,200 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 24,800 sq km " Polong i 11,852,462 ko tamdaw. O tatapangan no sowal O minganganay to Cate-Fanaw, ona sowal tonini i,o Sade sanay a sowal no Kanuli , o imi i,o fanaw, kakahaday a nanonanoman sanay. Ona sowal to nini i,o kalosowal no Nayciliya, Niru,Cate ato Komaylon, ira ko 400 ofald ko tamdaw sowalay tonini sowal, o itiraay i Lipiya a mamangay finacadan ato malaklakay a maro' i Sotan a tamdaw a sowal konini. Likisi I'ayaw niyiesoan to 7000 miheca iraay to ko masaniyaro'ay a tamdaw maro' itini,o ci'afoay a pala itini, orasaka, mahenay a matenak ko tamdaw. O tadamaanay a Nikarkaran-Pala o Etal, o I'ayaway ni Yieso to 2000 miheca. O masadangahay a pala no Cate a maomahay tamdaw mata'elifay ko 'ayaw ni Yieso to 2000 miheca. O kalengatan no masasiromaromaay a rayray no 'orip itini. I saka 9 sici tahira i saka 10 sici patireng ko Saaw tamdaw to sarakatay a hotian kitakit o Kanaymu-Pornu Hontian Kitakit(加奈姆-博爾努帝國;Kanem–Bornu Empire), Tahira sato i saka 16 sici mapatireng ko Pacimir-Hontian Kirakit ato Watayi-Hontian Kitakit , ona tolo a kitakit cila malalood cila malalood. Tahira to i 1883 miheca tahira 1893 miheca matekop no Lapihe-Cupayr kona toloay Hontian kitakit. O nidamaan no Frasu a congtong ci Haysan-Hapoloy , felihen no tapang no sofitay ci Yitolis-Topi. Na malacongtong to ci Topi, sapitokitokaw malacongton i 2005 miheca midemak to Fainawlan-Pitopa to sapiflicaw to kimpo ta malarid mamalacongtong kako yo sanay a pisafaloco' ningra, malalang no Mifelihay-Kasafelaw, mafodfod to ko kitakit, 2006 miheca, cowa ka pihayi ko Mifelihay-Kasafelaw to sinkiw maala heca ci Topi. Tongal sato ko kafodfod no kitakit i laloma', milekal ko Linhoko ano pakomira han i, a matiya to Tafo(達佛戰爭 ; Arapiya a sowal : الحرب في دارفور‎)sapipalahedawaw sa to finacadan a misawsaw(種族滅絕 ; Ikiris a sowal :genocide) Tamdaw O sa'osi i 2005 mihea ira ko 10,146,000 ko polong a tamdaw no Cate, o itokayay mahaop ko 25%, o iniyaro'ay ira ko 74%. Ilaloma' no nini i, mahaop ko 47.3% a tamdaw caho i 15 mihecaan, o nisofocan 1000 ko tamdaw mahop ko 42.35%, o mapatayay mahop ko 16.69%, o lalen no 'orip 47.2 ko mihecaan. O faco raramod no Cate a tamdaw i, cecay ko fainayan 'aloman ko fafahi, ira ko 39% a fafahiyan o matiniay ko 'orip, mihayiay ko riked no Cate to matiniay a kararamod. Talacowa milalangay ko rikec aka pipalo to fafahiyan sanay, nikawrira, mararid ira ko mapaloay a fafahiyan. Ano mirocok to dafong i, talacowa awaay ko pisakakinih no rikec i, nikawrira, o kakeridan no niyaro' misawkit sa i, pasitiniay i fainayan. I Cate cisafaw ko 200 ko kasasiromaroma no finacadan, o faco no niyaro' ira ko masamaanay, itiya ho yo mikowan ho Fransu tona kitakit, sapipatirengaw to sakalacecay no kitakit, nikawrira, o kakereidan no kasaetal ato wayway no pitooran ko ikakaay haratengen no Cate a tamdaw.o niyah a finacadan o niyah a kamaro'an. O sakakaay a finacadan i katimol o Sala tamdaw, o sakatosa o maro'ay i Saher etal a Arapiya tamdaw, i ka'amis o pakaenay to 'a'adopen a Tupu tamdaw. O sowal i, no sifo a sowal ono Faransu ato Arapiya a sowal, orama sa i, ira ho ko cisafaw to 100 ko sowal. Tata'ang ko pirecep no punka no Arapiya itini, orasaka, o kalosowal ko sowal no Arapiya. Pitooran Osao'si i 2014-15 miheca, ilaloma' no polong a tamdaw ira ko 52.1% o Muslin, 44.1% o Misakristoay ( Fa'elohay Kristo 23.9%, Tinsukiw 20%, 0.2% oroma a misakristoay), To'asan a pitooran(泛靈論; Ikiris a sowal :Animism) 0.3%, o cowa ka pitoor 2.8%, o caay ka pa'ifana' to pitooran 0.7%. O to'asan a pitooran hananay i, o paso'elinay to maamaan,o Islam Pitooran ato Misafristaay mapalamlam tono to'asan ho pitooran ato lisin. O Muslin masaopoay i ka'amis ato kawali no Cate, o To'asan Pitooran ato Kristo itiraay i katimol ato KaylaEtal. Ano do'edoen ko Tatapangan Rikec no kitakit, cowa pasicecay sanay i liongkay misikoray to ihekalay a 'orip, mipa'adingay to paifaloco'an a pitoor, o masasiromaromaay a pitooran i Cate manga'ay ko kalawidang.
S.PHON: == takaraj so~uwaɾ == ʦatə . itiraaj i sasifo~uʡan no~u afrika a karo~upaw kitakit, isakaʡamis mo~uɬ~ɮaʡəɬ~ɮo~u ato~u ɾipija, katimo~uɾ maɬ~ɮaʡəɬ~ɮo~u ato~u sifo~uʡaj-afrika kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit, isakaʡətip maɾafijaw ato~u kəmajro~uŋ, najʦirija, isakaʡətip maɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ ato~u niro~u~u kitakit. o~u ŋaŋan no~una kitakit nani mikiŋaŋanaj to~u ʦatə-fanaw, o~u satakarawaj a ɾo~uto~uk i,o~u itiraaj i saħara-tafo~utafo~ukan a ko~u~usi ɾo~uto~uk, o~u ənʦijaŋna ko~u sjo~uto~u, o~u sakakaaj ko~una to~ukaj. itini i ʦatə ʦisafaw ko~u *** finaʦaɬ~ɮan , o~u franso~u~u ato~u arab~b~vija ko~uno~u sifo~uʡan a so~uwaɾ, o~u isɾam a pito~uo~uran ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u saɾikaka. iʡajaw nijiəso~uan to~u **** miħəʦa iraaj to~u ko~u masanijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡ itini, taħira to~u saka* siʦi, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u masaro~umro~umaaj a kitakit mapatirəŋ matəko~up itini to~un apaɾa, miko~uwanaj to~u paɾiwaɾaj to~u sakaʡo~urip ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ to~u ʡəɬ~ɮəf no~u saħara-tafo~utafo~ukan. i **** miħəʦa maaro~uʡ no~u franso~u~u maɾaʦəʦaj a pəʦiħ no~u miko~uto~uɬ~ɮaj a kitakit no~u franso~u~u sifo~uʡaj-ko~unis no~u ʦikiw a afrika. **** miħəʦa kəriɬ~ɮən ni fo~uɾaŋso~uwa-to~umo~u~upapajiə misiikəɬ~ɮ nani piko~uwan no~u franso~u~u, na maɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi fo~uɾaŋso~uwa-to~umo~u~upapajiə i,mifəɾiħ ko~u mo~u~usɾin a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u tajaɾ niŋra, o~urasaka, i **** miħəʦa maɾəŋat ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan-ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ʦatə. **** miħəʦa mifəɾiħaj to~u sifo~u a so~ufitaj maʡəʦo~u naŋra ko~u sjo~uto~u, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u ikatimo~uɾaj a sifo~u a piko~uwan. nikawrira, maʦaʦo~uɾiʦo~uɾi ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮəan no~u mifəɾiħaj-so~ufitaj, saiko~uraj to~u i,ʦi ħasan-ħapo~uro~uj ko~u pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮaj to~una ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a maɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ, ʦaka ħaɾafin mafəɾiħ no~uttapaŋ-so~ufitaj ʦi jito~uɾis-to~upi-jitəno~u . nani **** miħəʦaan maɾiŋato~u ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ no~u saʡətipaj so~utan, sano~u janan sato~u ʦa ka ʦa kaira ko~u rarawraw no~u ʦatə. o~ura ko~u saka maɾa sanikawaj ato~u kaɾipajso~uaj ko~u maɾatapaŋaj a kitakit itini i ħəkaɾ. i **** miħəʦa maʦəro~ur to~uno~u simaɾ kaso~uɾiŋ ko~u tako~umo~uɬ~ɮ o~u sapiɾiʡətan no~u ʦatə kitakit. i ** ** n, ** ** ə, no~uafiɾika ko~u ʦħaɬ~ɮ. po~uɾo~uŋ no~u səkaɾaj i *.*** miɾɾio~un s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŋaŋan. " "o~u səkaɾaj no~u səra i, *,***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a səkaɾaj i, **,*** s* km " po~uɾo~uŋ i **,***,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u tatapaŋan no~u so~uwaɾ o~u miŋaŋanaj to~u ʦatə-fanaw, o~una so~uwaɾ to~unini i,o~u saɬ~ɮə sanaj a so~uwaɾ no~u kano~u~uɾi , o~u imi i,o~u fanaw, kakaħaɬ~ɮaj a nano~unano~uman sanaj. o~una so~uwaɾ to~u nini i,o~u kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ no~u najʦiɾija, niro~u~u,ʦatə ato~u ko~umajɾo~un, ira ko~u *** o~ufaɾɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw so~uwaɾaj to~unini so~uwaɾ, o~u itiraaj i ɾipija a mamaŋaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u maɾakɾakaj a maro~uʡ i so~utan a tamɬ~ɮaw a so~uwaɾ ko~unini. ɾikisi iʡajaw nijiəso~uan to~u **** miħəʦa iraaj to~u ko~u masanijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡ itini,o~u ʦiʡafo~uaj a paɾa itini, o~urasaka, maħənaj a matənak ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a nikarkaran-paɾa o~u ətaɾ, o~u iʡajawaj ni jiəso~u to~u **** miħəʦa. o~u masaɬ~ɮaŋaħaj a paɾa no~u ʦatə a mao~umaħaj tamɬ~ɮaw mataʡəɾifaj ko~u ʡajaw ni jiəso~u to~u **** miħəʦa. o~u kaɾəŋatan no~u masasiro~umaro~umaaj a rajraj no~u ʡo~urip itini. i saka * siʦi taħira i saka ** siʦi patirəŋ ko~u saaw tamɬ~ɮaw to~u sarakataj a ħo~utian kitakit o~u kanajmo~u~u-po~urno~u~u ħo~untian kitakit(***-*****;kanəm*b~b~vo~urno~u~u əmpirə), taħira sato~u i saka ** siʦi mapatirəŋ ko~u paʦimir-ħo~untian kirakit ato~u wataji-ħo~untian kitakit , o~una to~uɾo~u a kitakit ʦiɾa maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ʦiɾa maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. taħira to~u i **** miħəʦa taħira **** miħəʦa matəko~up no~u ɾapiħə-ʦo~u~upajr ko~una to~uɾo~uaj ħo~untian kitakit. o~u niɬ~ɮamaan no~u fraso~u~u a ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ħajsan-ħapo~uɾo~uj , fəɾiħən no~u tapaŋ no~u so~ufitaj ʦi jito~uɾis-to~upi. na maɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ to~u ʦi to~upi, sapito~ukito~ukaw maɾaʦo~uŋto~un i **** miħəʦa miɬ~ɮəmak to~u fainawɾan-pito~upa to~u sapifɾiʦaw to~u kimpo~u ta maɾariɬ~ɮ mamaɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ kako~u jo~u sanaj a pisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra, maɾaɾaŋ no~u mifəɾiħaj-kasafəɾaw, mafo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u kitakit, **** miħəʦa, ʦo~uwa ka piħaji ko~u mifəɾiħaj-kasafəɾaw to~u sinkiw maaɾa ħəʦa ʦi to~upi. to~uŋaɾ sato~u ko~u kafo~uɬ~ɮfo~uɬ~ɮ no~u kitakit i ɾaɾo~umaʡ, miɾəkaɾ ko~u ɾinħo~uko~u ano~u pako~umira ħan i, a matija to~u tafo~u(**** ; arapija a so~uwaɾ : ***** ** *******)sapipaɾaħəɬ~ɮawaw sa to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a misawsaw(**** ; ikiris a so~uwaɾ :*əno~uʦiɬ~ɮə) tamɬ~ɮaw o~u saʡo~usi i **** miħəa ira ko~u **,***,*** ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ʦatə, o~u ito~ukajaj maħao~up ko~u **%, o~u inijaro~uʡaj ira ko~u **%. iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u nini i, maħao~up ko~u **.*% a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaħo~u i ** miħəʦaan, o~u niso~ufo~uʦan **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw maħo~up ko~u **.**%, o~u mapatajaj maħo~up ko~u **.**%, o~u ɾaɾən no~u ʡo~urip **.* ko~u miħəʦaan. o~u faʦo~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ʦatə a tamɬ~ɮaw i, ʦəʦaj ko~u fainajan ʡaɾo~uman ko~u fafaħi, ira ko~u **% a fafaħijan o~u matiniaj ko~u ʡo~urip, miħajiaj ko~u rikəɬ~ɮ no~u ʦatə to~u matiniaj a kararamo~uɬ~ɮ. taɾaʦo~uwa miɾaɾaŋaj ko~u rikəʦ aka pipaɾo~u to~u fafaħijan sanaj, nikawrira, marariɬ~ɮ ira ko~u mapaɾo~uaj a fafaħijan. ano~u miro~uʦo~uk to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ i, taɾaʦo~uwa awaaj ko~u pisakakiniħ no~u rikəʦ i, nikawrira, o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ misawkit sa i, pasitiniaj i fainajan. i ʦatə ʦisafaw ko~u *** ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u faʦo~u no~u nijaro~uʡ ira ko~u masamaanaj, itija ħo~u jo~u miko~uwan ħo~u franso~u~u to~una kitakit, sapipatirəŋaw to~u sakaɾaʦəʦaj no~u kitakit, nikawrira, o~u kakərəiɬ~ɮan no~u kasaətaɾ ato~u wajwaj no~u pito~uo~uran ko~u ikakaaj ħaratəŋən no~u ʦatə a tamɬ~ɮaw.o~u nijaħ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u nijaħ a kamaro~uʡan. o~u sakakaaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i katimo~uɾ o~u saɾa tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u sakato~usa o~u maro~uʡaj i saħər ətaɾ a arapija tamɬ~ɮaw, i kaʡamis o~u pakaənaj to~u ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən a to~u~upo~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u so~uwaɾ i, no~u sifo~u a so~uwaɾ o~uno~u faranso~u~u ato~u arapija a so~uwaɾ, o~urama sa i, ira ħo~u ko~u ʦisafaw to~u *** ko~u so~uwaɾ. tataʡaŋ ko~u pirəʦəp no~u po~u~unka no~u arapija itini, o~urasaka, o~u kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u arapija. pito~uo~uran o~usao~uʡsi i ****-** miħəʦa, iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ira ko~u **.*% o~u mo~u~usɾin, **.*% o~u misakristo~uaj ( faʡəɾo~uħaj kristo~u **.*%, tinso~u~ukiw **%, *.*% o~uro~uma a misakristo~uaj), to~uʡasan a pito~uo~uran(***; ikiris a so~uwaɾ :animism) *.*%, o~u ʦo~uwa ka pito~uo~ur *.*%, o~u ʦaaj ka paʡifanaʡ to~u pito~uo~uran *.*%. o~u to~uʡasan a pito~uo~uran ħananaj i, o~u paso~uʡəɾinaj to~u maamaan,o~u isɾam pito~uo~uran ato~u misafristaaj mapaɾamɾam to~uno~u to~uʡasan ħo~u pito~uo~uran ato~u ɾisin. o~u mo~u~usɾin masao~upo~uaj i kaʡamis ato~u kawaɾi no~u ʦatə, o~u to~uʡasan pito~uo~uran ato~u kristo~u itiraaj i katimo~uɾ ato~u kajɾaətaɾ. ano~u ɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uən ko~u tatapaŋan rikəʦ no~u kitakit, ʦo~uwa pasiʦəʦaj sanaj i ɾio~uŋkaj misiko~uraj to~u iħəkaɾaj a ʡo~urip, mipaʡaɬ~ɮiŋaj to~u paifaɾo~uʦo~uʡan a pito~uo~ur, o~u masasiro~umaro~umaaj a pito~uo~uran i ʦatə maŋaʡaj ko~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ.
